role: A React presentation component that surfaces a build-intent's frozen context bundle, lets operators toggle per-item pins, and guards navigation to ui:// loci only.
capabilities: Render persisted payload.context[] as a sorted, newest-first list of strata items
Map each item's kind to a glyph/label (comment, chat, version, history, change, fallback)
Optimistically toggle and display per-item pinned state via api.pin
Fail-loud validation and error display for missing address/ts or failed pin writes
Enable navigation only for ui:// addresses through onNavigate; disable and label non-ui:// addresses
Render item text and an explicit empty state
Display bundle count and pinned-count summary
substance_why: It fully implements the context-bundle view: sorting, rendering, pin interaction with optimistic overlay and error handling, plus a registry-aware navigation guard.
interactions_present: Click pin button to call api.pin and update local pin overlay
Click a ui:// address button to invoke onNavigate
Hover tooltips via native title attributes
interactions_missing: No keyboard-accessible controls or focus management
No retry/clear action after a pin error
No loading state while the parent fetches the bundle
No expand/collapse or truncation for long item text
No pagination or virtualization for large bundles
run:// addresses are only labeled, not navigable (reserved design call)
Visual/form treatment is flagged as needs-tim
performance_risks: Whole list re-renders on any pinOverlay/busyTs/err change
Sorting with localeCompare is O(n log n) and not virtualized
Inline IIFE inside the map creates fresh functions/elements per item each render
Large item.text blocks are rendered unconditionally without truncation
reuse_why: The domain concepts—frozen context bundle, optimistic pin affordance, and ui:// navigation guard—are correct and should be kept, but the component should be rebuilt to separate state, API calls, and presentation.
decomposition_hints: Extract a PinButton component/hook that owns api.pin, busy, and optimistic state
Extract a ContextItem component for kind glyph, address link guard, text, and pin slot
Extract sorting and empty-state logic into a container or utility
Extract the ui:// vs run:// address guard into a shared navigation utility
Separate presentational styling from the needs-tim markup layer
